key.name: seek-unit
key.summary: Unit ID to use with seeking value

key.name: seek-value
key.summary: Time amount to seek with single press of arrow keys

key.name: server-enabled
key.summary: Enable Server feature for remote playback control

key.name: audio-offset
key.summary: Offset time for audio stream relative to video (milliseconds)

key.name: subtitle-offset
key.summary: Offset time for subtitle stream relative to video (milliseconds)

key.name: volume
key.summary: Stores last volume value to apply on startup

key.name: speed
key.summary: Stores last speed value to apply on startup

key.name: progression-mode
key.summary: Stores last queue progression mode used to apply on startup

key.name: subtitles-enabled
key.summary: Stores last subtitle streams enabled value to apply on startup
